summary: Iteration 11 testing complete - Mentorship creation system fully verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including 'Criar Mentoria' button in sidebar, MentorshipPanel with tabs, knowledge upload, text input, and generate button.

issues: Modal close button (X or ArrowLeft) has overlay interception issue - clicking requires force=True in Playwright. Cosmetic only, panel can be closed by clicking outside or using keyboard.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/mentorship/upload-knowledge correctly handles .txt, .md, .csv files with multipart/form-data
GET /api/mentorship/knowledge returns list without content field (performance optimization)
DELETE /api/mentorship/knowledge/{id} correctly removes knowledge and verifies deletion
POST /api/mentorship/generate uses llm_generate_for_mentorship which falls back to Emergent LLM (gpt-4o-mini)
GET /api/mentorship/list returns user's mentorships sorted by created_at descending
GET /api/mentorship/{id} returns full mentorship content including generated content
DELETE /api/mentorship/{id} correctly removes mentorship and returns 404 on subsequent GET
MOIRA agent template has mentorship capabilities in system_prompt
NOVA agent template has content creation capabilities for mentorship lessons
MentorshipPanel.js has data-testid attributes for testing: mentorship-panel, knowledge-text-input, generate-mentorship-btn
Sidebar.js has data-testid='open-mentorship-btn' with GraduationCap icon
Generate button correctly disabled (opacity 0.5) when no knowledge provided
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (knowledge files, mentorships) - cleaned up after tests using TEST_ prefix pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 added mentorship creation system. Key endpoints: POST /api/mentorship/upload-knowledge (multipart/form-data), GET /api/mentorship/knowledge, DELETE /api/mentorship/knowledge/{id}, POST /api/mentorship/generate (LLM-powered, may take 30-60s), GET /api/mentorship/list, GET /api/mentorship/{id}, DELETE /api/mentorship/{id}. Frontend: MentorshipPanel.js with 'Criar Mentoria' and 'Mentorias' tabs. Sidebar has 'Criar Mentoria' button with GraduationCap icon. LLM generation uses Emergent fallback (gpt-4o-mini) since Ollama is not available.

PASS - Returns id, filename, size, preview
backend_api.GET /api/mentorship/knowledge: PASS - Returns list without content field
backend_api.DELETE /api/mentorship/knowledge/{id}: PASS - Removes knowledge, verified with GET
backend_api.POST /api/mentorship/generate: PASS - Generates mentorship with LLM, returns full content
backend_api.POST /api/mentorship/generate (no knowle: PASS - Returns 400 when no knowledge provided
backend_api.DELETE /api/mentorship/{id}: PASS - Removes mentorship, verified with GET returning 404
backend_api.MOIRA and NOVA agents: PASS - Both have mentorship capabilities in templates

frontend_ui.'Criar Mentoria' tab: PASS - Visible and active by default
frontend_ui.'Mentorias' tab: PASS - Shows count (0) and empty state
frontend_ui.Generate button enabled state: PASS - Full opacity after adding knowledge
frontend_ui.Target audience input field: PASS - Placeholder 'Ex: Iniciantes em negocio online'

notes.llm_generation: LLM generation uses Emergent fallback (gpt-4o-mini) since Ollama is not available. Generation takes 30-60 seconds.
notes.file_upload: Upload endpoint accepts .txt, .md, .csv files via multipart/form-data
notes.knowledge_limit: Knowledge content limited to 50k chars per file, 15k chars sent to LLM
